name: Docker
tagline: Build, ship, and run containerized applications
description: Industry-standard platform for developing, shipping, and running applications inside lightweight, portable containers. Supports multi-stage builds, compose orchestration, and Docker Hub registry.

name: Kubernetes
tagline: Production-grade container orchestration at scale
description: Automate deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications across clusters. Features self-healing, service discovery, load balancing, and rolling updates.

name: Jenkins
tagline: Extensible open-source CI/CD automation server
description: Leading automation server for building, testing, and deploying software. Supports pipeline-as-code with Jenkinsfiles, 1,800+ plugins, and distributed builds across multiple agents.

name: Terraform
tagline: Infrastructure as code for multi-cloud provisioning
description: Define cloud infrastructure using declarative HCL configuration files. Supports AWS, Azure, GCP, and 3,000+ providers with state management, plan previews, and modular composition.

name: Ansible
tagline: Agentless IT automation and configuration management
description: Automate configuration management, application deployment, and task orchestration using simple YAML playbooks. Agentless architecture connects via SSH with no remote daemon required.

name: Prometheus
tagline: Metrics-based monitoring and alerting toolkit
description: Pull-based monitoring system with a dimensional data model, PromQL query language, and built-in alerting. Designed for reliability and operational simplicity in dynamic environments.

name: Grafana
tagline: Observability dashboards for metrics and logs visualization
description: Create interactive dashboards for Prometheus, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, and 100+ data sources. Features alerting, annotations, templating, and team collaboration with role-based access.

name: Postman
tagline: API development and testing platform for teams
description: Design, test, document, and monitor APIs with an intuitive interface. Features collections, environments, automated testing, mock servers, and API documentation publishing.

name: Selenium
tagline: Browser automation framework for web application testing
description: Automate web browsers for end-to-end testing across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Supports multiple programming languages with WebDriver protocol and Selenium Grid for parallel execution.

name: Jest
tagline: Delightful JavaScript testing with zero configuration
description: Complete testing framework with built-in assertions, mocking, code coverage, and snapshot testing. Optimized for React applications with parallel test execution and watch mode.

name: Cypress
tagline: Fast, reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps
description: Next-generation testing framework running directly in the browser. Features time-travel debugging, automatic waiting, real-time reloading, and network traffic control.

name: Apache JMeter
tagline: Load testing and performance measurement for web services
description: Measure performance and load test web applications, REST APIs, databases, and FTP servers. Supports distributed testing, parameterization, and detailed HTML reporting.

name: Playwright
tagline: Cross-browser end-to-end testing by Microsoft
description: Reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit. Features auto-wait, test isolation, trace viewer, and codegen for recording test scripts.

name: Figma
tagline: Collaborative interface design and prototyping in the browser
description: Real-time collaborative design tool for creating interfaces, prototypes, and design systems. Features auto-layout, components, variables, dev mode, and FigJam whiteboarding.

name: Excalidraw
tagline: Hand-drawn style whiteboard for technical diagrams
description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching diagrams with a hand-drawn aesthetic. Features real-time collaboration, shape libraries, encryption, and embeddable components for documentation.

name: Penpot
tagline: Open-source design and prototyping platform
description: Web-based design tool built on open standards (SVG). Features components, design tokens, interactive prototyping, and self-hosting capability for enterprise teams.

name: Adobe XD
tagline: Vector-based UI/UX design and prototyping tool
description: Design, prototype, and share user experiences for web and mobile applications. Features repeat grids, responsive resize, voice prototyping, and Creative Cloud integration.

name: TablePlus
tagline: Modern native database management with intuitive UI
description: Lightweight GUI client for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, and more. Features inline editing, query history, SSH tunneling, and multi-tab workspaces.

name: DBeaver
tagline: Universal database tool for developers and DBAs
description: Cross-platform database management supporting 80+ databases. Features SQL editor with auto-completion, ER diagrams, data export, and comparison tools.

name: MongoDB Compass
tagline: Visual GUI for exploring and managing MongoDB data
description: Official MongoDB GUI for querying, optimizing, and analyzing data. Features aggregation pipeline builder, schema visualization, index management, and real-time performance metrics.

name: Prisma Studio
tagline: Visual database browser for Prisma ORM projects
description: GUI for viewing and editing data in Prisma-managed databases. Browse tables, filter records, edit inline, and manage relations with a spreadsheet-like interface.

name: pgAdmin
tagline: Administration and management platform for PostgreSQL
description: Feature-rich open-source management tool for PostgreSQL. Includes a query tool with auto-complete, graphical query planner, backup/restore wizards, and server monitoring dashboard.

name: VS Code
tagline: Lightweight, extensible source code editor by Microsoft
description: Free code editor with IntelliSense, debugging, Git integration, and a marketplace of 50,000+ extensions. Supports remote development, GitHub Copilot, and notebook editing.

name: Cursor
tagline: AI-first code editor built for pair programming with AI
description: Fork of VS Code with deep AI integration. Features multi-line autocomplete, codebase-aware chat, AI-powered refactoring, and natural language code editing with context awareness.

name: Zed
tagline: High-performance multiplayer code editor in Rust
description: GPU-accelerated editor built from scratch in Rust for speed. Features real-time collaboration, integrated terminal, AI assistance, and language server protocol support.

name: JetBrains IDEs
tagline: Professional IDEs for every language and framework
description: Suite of intelligent IDEs including IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, and GoLand. Features deep code analysis, refactoring, database tools, and built-in version control.

name: Neovim
tagline: Hyperextensible Vim-based text editor for terminal users
description: Modern fork of Vim with Lua scripting, built-in LSP client, tree-sitter parsing, and async plugin architecture. Designed for terminal-native developer workflows.

name: Burp Suite
tagline: Web application security testing platform
description: Industry-standard toolkit for web security testing. Features intercepting proxy, automated scanner, intruder for brute-force attacks, repeater for manual testing, and extensibility via BApp Store.

name: OWASP ZAP
tagline: Open-source web app security scanner for finding vulnerabilities
description: Free security tool for finding vulnerabilities in web applications. Features automated scanning, spidering, fuzzing, WebSocket testing, and CI/CD integration for DevSecOps workflows.

name: Wireshark
tagline: Network protocol analyzer for deep packet inspection
description: Capture and interactively browse network traffic. Supports 3,000+ protocols, live capture and offline analysis, rich display filters, and export to multiple formats.

name: Nmap
tagline: Network discovery and security auditing utility
description: Discover hosts and services on a network with port scanning, OS detection, version detection, and scriptable interaction with target services via the Nmap Scripting Engine.

name: Metasploit
tagline: Penetration testing framework for offensive security
description: World's most used penetration testing framework. Features exploit modules, payload generation, post-exploitation tools, and integration with vulnerability scanners for comprehensive assessments.

name: Android Studio
tagline: Official IDE for Android app development by Google
description: Complete development environment for building Android apps. Features visual layout editor, APK analyzer, Kotlin support, Jetpack Compose previews, and built-in emulator.

name: Xcode
tagline: Apple's IDE for building iOS, macOS, and watchOS apps
description: Integrated development environment for Apple platforms. Includes Interface Builder, Instruments profiler, TestFlight integration, SwiftUI previews, and Simulator for all Apple devices.

name: Expo
tagline: Framework and platform for universal React Native apps
description: Build, deploy, and iterate on native Android, iOS, and web apps from a single React Native codebase. Features hot reloading, OTA updates, push notifications, and managed cloud builds.

name: Flutter SDK
tagline: Google's UI toolkit for cross-platform native apps
description: Build natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single Dart codebase. Features hot reload, rich widget library, platform-adaptive design, and Impeller rendering engine.

name: GitHub Actions
tagline: CI/CD and workflow automation built into GitHub
description: Automate builds, tests, and deployments directly from GitHub repositories. Features reusable workflows, matrix builds, 15,000+ marketplace actions, and self-hosted runners.

name: Argo CD
tagline: Declarative GitOps continuous delivery for Kubernetes
description: Kubernetes-native continuous delivery tool following GitOps principles. Automatically syncs application state with Git repositories, supports Helm, Kustomize, and plain YAML manifests.

name: k6
tagline: Modern load testing tool using JavaScript test scripts
description: Developer-centric load testing tool by Grafana Labs. Write tests in JavaScript, run from CLI or cloud, and integrate results into Grafana dashboards for performance analysis.

name: Redis Insight
tagline: Visual tool for managing and optimizing Redis databases
description: Official GUI for Redis with real-time data browsing, CLI integration, memory analysis, slow log inspection, and support for Redis modules including RediSearch and RedisJSON.

name: Sublime Text
tagline: Sophisticated text editor for code and markup
description: Fast, lightweight text editor known for Goto Anything, multiple selections, command palette, and distraction-free mode. Features a Python plugin API and cross-platform support.
